Dashboard.customizeDashboardDesc: Choose visible widgets, drag and drop them, or use up/down buttons to prioritize the layout.
Dashboard.widgetPickerDesc: Toggle widgets with checkboxes. Drag the handle icon to reorder priorities; view mode locks the layout for safe operation.
Dashboard.emptyVisibleWidgets: No widgets are visible in this tab
Dashboard.emptyMarginDesc: This range has no contracts with enough COGS data to calculate margin.
Dashboard.emptyDsoDesc: Receivables in this period are currently safe.
Dashboard.emptyInventoryDesc: No sales or valuation data is available to calculate turnover in this range.
Dashboard.emptyLogisticsDesc: No shipments with logistics cost are available in the selected date range.
Dashboard.sectionPrimaryDesc: Priority KPIs for the current tab. Click any card to inspect details.
Dashboard.sectionFocusDesc: Each tab only shows business-specific analysis blocks to keep the dashboard focused.
Dashboard.sectionChartsDesc: Large charts are for trend reading; side panels help navigate status quickly.
Dashboard.sectionActionableDesc: Warnings and actionable lists scoped to the current operating role.

ThreeWayMatching.title: 3-Way Matching
ThreeWayMatching.description: Control variance between Purchase Orders, Goods Receipts, and Vendor Invoices

ruleAlert.title: 3-Way Matching Principle
ruleAlert.description: Payment validity: (1) PO Quantity = Actual Received Quantity (GRN) and (2) PO Unit Price = Vendor Invoice Unit Price.

expand.title: Detailed Variance Analysis: {poNumber}
expand.syncStatus: Feature is synchronizing real-time data with warehouse...

detail.readyDescription: The PO, accepted goods receipt, and vendor invoice match by quantity and unit price.
detail.blockedDescription: Please review missing GRNs, missing invoices, quantity variances, or price variances before payment.
detail.missingGrnDescription: This PO has no goods receipt yet. Create the GRN first, then record the vendor invoice and return to matching.
detail.missingInvoiceDescription: This PO has a GRN but no vendor invoice yet. Create the Vendor Invoice from Purchase Orders before payment matching.

taxSettings.title: Purchase Tax Settings
taxSettings.description: Set the default VAT rate for purchase orders created from PRs or manually.
taxSettings.help: Applies to new POs only. Existing POs and invoices keep the tax rate snapshot from when they were created.
taxSettings.missingToken: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
taxSettings.loadErrorDescription: Could not load the default VAT rate from the system.
taxSettings.saveErrorDescription: Could not save the VAT setting.

matchingSettings.title: 3-Way Matching Rules
matchingSettings.description: Configure variance tolerances for purchase orders, goods receipts, and vendor invoices.
matchingSettings.help: Applies to the 3-Way Matching screen. Set 0 to require exact matching.
matchingSettings.missingToken: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
matchingSettings.validation: Quantity cannot be negative and price percentage must be between 0 and 100%.
matchingSettings.loadErrorDescription: Could not load matching rules from the system.

notifications.syncSuccessDescription: The system checked the latest exchange rates.

CurrencyManagement.note: These rates will be used as the conversion basis for contracts and customer invoices.
